gov.nist.javax.sip.header
インタフェース SIPHeaderNames

既知のサブインタフェースの一覧:
SIPConstants
既知の実装クラスの一覧:
Accept, AcceptEncoding, AcceptEncodingList, AcceptLanguage, AcceptLanguageList, AcceptList, AddressParametersHeader, AlertInfo, AlertInfoList, Allow, AllowEvents, AllowEventsList, AllowList, AuthenticationHeader, AuthenticationInfo, AuthenticationInfoList, Authorization, AuthorizationList, CallID, CallInfo, CallInfoList, Contact, ContactList, ContentDisposition, ContentEncoding, ContentEncodingList, ContentLanguage, ContentLanguageList, ContentLength, ContentType, CSeq, ErrorInfo, ErrorInfoList, Event, Expires, ExtensionHeaderImpl, ExtensionHeaderList, From, InReplyTo, InReplyToList, MaxForwards, MimeVersion, MinExpires, NameMap, Organization, ParametersHeader, Priority, ProxyAuthenticate, ProxyAuthenticateList, ProxyAuthorization, ProxyRequire, ProxyRequireList, RAck, Reason, ReasonList, RecordRoute, RecordRouteList, ReferTo, ReplyTo, Require, RequireList, RetryAfter, Route, RouteList, RSeq, Server, SIPDateHeader, SIPHeader, SIPHeaderList, Subject, SubscriptionState, Supported, SupportedList, TimeStamp, To, Unsupported, UnsupportedList, UserAgent, Via, ViaList, Warning, WarningList, WWWAuthenticate, WWWAuthenticateList
public interface SIPHeaderNames

SIPHeader names that are supported by this parser

バージョン:
JAIN-SIP-1.1 $Revision: 1.2 $ $Date: 2004/01/22 13:26:29 $
作成者:
M. Ranganathan
This code is in the public domain.
